experience.title: Restaurant Manager
responsibilities: Monitor daily operations with a goal of keeping everything orderly.
Keep content updated: online website, online ordering platform, menu, hours and more.
Resolve conflicts if and when they occur, both customer and employees.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern/Co-op
responsibilities: Contributed to Shaw Industries Service Portal projects, including the building of catalog items, automating of backend workflow, and other frontend features.
Developed catalog items used by hundreds of users, making it easier for employees to request access to services, products or permissions using ServiceNow, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
Automated workflow for many procedures on the portal, minimizing time and increasing organization.
Gathered requirements from business owners and stakeholders, created epics and stories, and conducted testing by documenting complete test scripts for users through the agile methodology.
Migrated existing features from old production to new production during release and removed unused features.
